'''Imperial Mining, Ltd.''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Derilyn]]. Owned and operated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it was responsible for mining the planets of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] in order to provide raw materials for Imperial weapons makers. A large mine which employed one thousand [[Miner/Legends|miners]] and several thousand [[mining droid]]s was set on [[Berea]] which was an important source world of [[Ore/Legends|ore]] for '''IML'''. However, the company found limited success due to the competition from the much larger [[Radell Mining Corporation]].
